testcase.name: test_pin_status_reports_set

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (None is True or None is True or None is True) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0>('has_pin') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0> = {'configured': True, 'created_at': '2026-05-04T19:31:36.191591+00:00', 'failed_attempts': 1, 'locked_until': None, ...}.get + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0>('pin_set') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0> = {'configured': True, 'created_at': '2026-05-04T19:31:36.191591+00:00', 'failed_attempts': 1, 'locked_until': None, ...}.get + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0>('set') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0> = {'configured': True, 'created_at': '2026-05-04T19:31:36.191591+00:00', 'failed_attempts': 1, 'locked_until': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_demo_pin_seed.py:56: in test_pin_status_reports_set assert body.get("has_pin") is True or body.get("pin_set") is True or body.get("set") is True E AssertionError: assert (None is True or None is True or None is True) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0>('has_pin') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0> = {'configured': True, 'created_at': '2026-05-04T19:31:36.191591+00:00', 'failed_attempts': 1, 'locked_until': None, ...}.get E + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0>('pin_set') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0> = {'configured': True, 'created_at': '2026-05-04T19:31:36.191591+00:00', 'failed_attempts': 1, 'locked_until': None, ...}.get E + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0>('set') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56647843c0> = {'configured': True, 'created_at': '2026-05-04T19:31:36.191591+00:00', 'failed_attempts': 1, 'locked_until': None, ...}.get
